## Purpose 
<!--- One sentence to describe the purpose of this PR, refer to any linked issues:
#14 -- this will link to issue 14
Closes #2 -- this will automatically close issue 2 on PR merge
-->
Use the new interface in SurfaceFluxes v0.15 to calculate surface fluxes. For the bucket simulation, call the turbulent_fluxes! in ClimaLand directly. Also updates dependencies.

title: update surface fluxes and update dependencies

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
Add a module to contain the `step!` and `run!` functions. I'm choosing not to add unit tests because setting up a CoupledSimulation object takes a long time and these functions are thoroughly tested in the integration tests.

Also moves `postprocess(cs)` into the Plotting module. This function doesn't entirely do plotting but it mostly does so I think this is fine.

closes #1610

## Content
- [x] add SimCoordinator module
- [x] add SimCoordinator docs page
- [x] update ClimaCoupler module exports for usability
- [x] merge `postprocess_sim`, `postprocess`, and move `postprocess` into Plotting module
- [x] remove `experiments/ClimaEarth/user_io/` folder
- [x] confirm buildkite results are identical to main

## Next steps
Now very few functions remain in setup_run.jl, and they all depend on code defined in the component model files within `experiments/ClimaEarth/components/`. The next step will be to move the component model code into extensions, and then move the last setup_run.jl functions into src.
title: add SimCoordinator module

body:
<!--- THESE LINES ARE COMMENTED -->
## Purpose 
We have some `pkgversion` checks in the code to enable support across package versions. We don't need to keep these around for versions that are no longer included in our compats, so I cleaned them up in this PR.


## To-do
- [x] for each package version that we don't support anymore, remove the pkgversion check and keep the newer branch
title: remove old pkgversion checks
